annotations.annotation: Regulation .01 amended effective September 12, 1983 (10:18 Md. R. 1609)
Regulation .01B amended effective May 29, 1981 (8:11 Md. R. 975); July 1, 1987 (14:7 Md. R. 833)
Regulation .02 adopted effective September 12, 1983 (10:18 Md. R. 1609)
Chapter revised effective January 15, 1989 (15:27 Md. R. 3131)
Regulation .01 repealed and new Regulation .01 adopted effective March 15, 1992 (19:4 Md. R. 474)
Regulation .01 amended effective January 15, 1996 (23:1 Md. R. 29)
Regulation .01 amended as an emergency provision effective January 1, 2002 (29:4 Md. R. 415); amended permanently effective April 29, 2002 (29:8 Md. R. 701)
Regulation .01 amended effective March 26, 2007 (34:6 Md. R. 627)
Regulation .01C amended effective January 26, 1998 (25:2 Md. R. 77)
Regulation .01D amended effective March 3, 2003 (30:4 Md. R. 317)
Regulation .01F amended effective July 1, 1996 (23:13 Md. R. 945); March 20, 2000 (27:5 Md. R. 585)
Regulation .01Q amended effective January 26, 1998 (25:2 Md. R. 77); March 20, 2000 (27:5 Md. R. 585)
Chapter repealed effective January 14, 2010 (37:1 Md. R. 14)
